title: Court Jester
tagline: When ELIAS is pulled into a tense situation he does not fully understand, he must navigate mounting pressure before everything collapses.

logline: When ELIAS is pulled into a tense situation he does not fully understand, he must navigate mounting pressure before everything collapses.
synopsis: As pressure mounts around ELIAS, incomplete information and rising tension force increasingly risky choices. What first appears to be one kind of threat gradually reveals itself to be something more complicated, pushing the story toward a reversal that challenges the protagonist's assumptions.
core_conflict: Elias must navigate ridiculous power structures, inflated egos, and escalating chaos without losing the part of themselves that makes them dangerous.
story_engine: Elias stumbles into a role far bigger than expected, and each attempt to survive the absurd rules of the kingdom only pulls the chaos closer.
reversal: The truth behind the situation is different from what the protagonist first assumes.
